# CDL Alpha Driving School

> CDL Alpha Driving School offers franchise opportunities for entrepreneurs to open commercial driver's license (CDL) training schools across the United States. Three investment tiers from $15,000. Grand opening May 23, 2026. Headquarters: Fort Worth, TX.

## About

CDL Alpha Driving School is a franchise system built to address the United States' 700,000+ commercial truck driver shortage. We empower entrepreneurs to open and operate their own CDL training schools using a proven curriculum, operational playbook, and marketing system — without requiring any prior trucking or CDL industry experience.

**Contact:** cdlschooldfw1@outlook.com
**Website:** https://cdlalphadrivingschool.org
**Franchise page:** https://cdlalphadrivingschool.org/franchise
**Grand Opening:** May 23, 2026
**Location:** Fort Worth, Texas (expanding nationwide)

## Franchise Opportunity

### Investment Tiers

| Tier | Investment | Royalty |
|------|-----------|---------|
| Starter | $15,000 – $25,000 | 5% monthly |
| Full Launch | $35,000 – $50,000 | 6% monthly |
| Premium Partner | $60,000 – $80,000 | 8% monthly (revenue share) |

### What Franchisees Receive

- Complete CDL training curriculum (meets all federal and state standards)
- CDL Alpha brand license and exclusive territory (Premium tier)
- Done-for-you marketing: social media templates, ad campaigns, lead generation
- 60-day structured onboarding program
- Software, admin tools, CRM, and enrollment system
- Instructor training and certification standards
- Ongoing support: quarterly franchise calls, compliance updates, HQ direct line
- SBA-friendly lender connections for financing

### Timeline to Opening

1. Submit application (Day 1–3)
2. Discovery call & approval (Day 4–10)
3. Sign agreement & fund (Day 11–20)
4. Training & setup (Day 21–80)
5. Grand opening & first students (Day 81–90)

Most franchisees enroll their first students within 2–4 weeks of completing onboarding.

## Market Opportunity

- **700,000+** commercial driver shortage in the United States
- **$80,000+** average CDL driver annual salary
- **$4 trillion** U.S. trucking industry size
- **160,000** new drivers needed per year
- Industries dependent on CDL drivers: e-commerce, food distribution, healthcare supply, construction

The U.S. trucking industry faces a historic, ongoing driver shortage. Every CDL issued is both a life changed and a revenue stream for the franchise owner.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Do I need trucking experience?**
No. CDL Alpha provides the complete curriculum, instructor standards, and playbook. Business and management skills are required; industry expertise is provided.

**What licenses are needed to open a CDL school?**
A business license, a state-approved truck driving school license, and FMCSA compliance. The onboarding team guides each franchisee through their specific state requirements (typically 30–45 days).

**How many trucks do I need to start?**
The Starter tier works with 1 truck. Full Launch and Premium tiers typically start with 2–3 vehicles. Leasing is an option to reduce upfront costs.

**How quickly can I enroll first students?**
Most franchisees enroll within 2–4 weeks post-onboarding. CDL demand is high enough that marketing campaigns often generate leads before doors open.

**What territories are available?**
Expanding nationwide. Priority markets: Southeast, Midwest, Southwest, Pacific Northwest. Territory availability confirmed within 48 hours of application.

**Is financing available?**
Yes. CDL Alpha partners with SBA-friendly lenders and equipment financing specialists. Connections provided during the discovery call.
